features: Kaloba Tablets - A herbal medicinal product used to relieve the symptoms of common cold, such as sore throat, cough and blocked or runny nose, based on long-standing use as a traditional remedy.
Pelargonium Sidoides - Kaloba contains Pelargonium sidoides, a member of the geranium family. It has long-stalked leaves that are mildly aromatic, heart-shaped and velvety.
Herbal Formula - Kaloba cold and flu tablets have been registered under the Traditional Herbal Registration Scheme (THRS). Suitable for vegetarians.
High Quality - This cold and cough medicine is carefully tested and produced to meet superior quality standards. We only use the finest plant-based ingredients for our products.
Schwabe Pharma - We offer a range of licensed traditional herbal medicines that can be used to prevent or relieve the symptoms of many common ailments and are an alternative to conventional medicine.
description: Product Description Kaloba is used to relieve the symptoms of the common cold, sore throats and coughs exclusively based on long standing use as a tradit ional remedy. Kaloba is one of the few herbal cold remedies on the market that contains Pelargonium. Pelargonium sidoides is a member of the geranium family, which has long stalked leaves that are mildly aromatic, heart shaped and velvety. We are committed to improving people's health and wellbeing and do so using only the finest plant based, natural healthcare products. Indications For the relief of the symptoms of the common cold, runny noses, blocked noses, coughs and sore throats. Ingredients Active ingredient: Pelargonium sidoides root extract (EPsÂ® 7630). Each 10g (9.75ml) of solution contains 8mg of dried root extract Directions For Adults and Children over 12 years old. Take one tablet three times a day. Tablet should be swallowed whole with water and should not be chewed. Safety Warning Suitable for adults and children over 12 years old. Do not exceed the stated dose. Do not use if you are allergic to any of the ingredients, suffer from severe liver or kidney disease, are pregnant or breast-feeding. If you suffer from an increased tendency to bleeding and/or take anti-coagulating drugs such as warfarin, these is a theoretical risk that taking this product may increase the risk of bleeding. Box Contains 21 tablets See more
